refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to address distinct aspects of worksite mapping, enabling focused design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-FR by demonstrating accurate terrain maps, reliable obstacle detection, and correct work-zone representation in the system output.
sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite
Represent designated work-zones within the worksite

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition
Implement spatial data processing algorithms for terrain modeling
Use GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses the FR with minimal coupling to other functions; terrain and obstacle data acquisition is a foundational step.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and integration of LIDAR and camera sensors
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting mapping quality
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing terrain and obstacle processing separately if complexity increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level integration and processing of worksite mapping data

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams from vehicle and external sensors

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite map data to planning and execution modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as mapping is core to NGHE; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not process mapping; high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation is a consumer, not a producer, of mapping data.
Safety Services may use mapping data but should not own mapping functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports integration with planning and safety functions.
containment_risks: Potential complexity overload in NGHE Solution module
Interface bandwidth constraints on Network Link
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-module partitioning within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via sensor data validation and map accuracy checks within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of mapping functions if complexity grows
Validate interface bandwidth and latency requirements for Network Link

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition is sufficient with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting safety-critical requirements and architectural clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite
Represent designated work-zones within the worksite

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data quality is sufficient for mapping accuracy
NGHE Solution module can handle processing load
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution mapping processing
